sentences.sentence: The Ecotourism Society defines ecotourism as "a responsible travel to natural areas which conserves the environment and improves the welfare of local people".
sentences.translation: 生态旅游协会将生态旅游定义为“一种负责任的、前往自然区域的旅行方式，既能保护环境，又能改善当地居民的福祉”。

structure.text: as "a responsible travel to natural areas which conserves the environment and improves the welfare of local people"
which conserves the environment and improves the welfare of local people

difficult_points: define ... as ... 表示“将……定义为……”，引号内是该协会给出的完整定义。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 natural areas，说明这类区域需同时满足保护环境和改善福祉两个条件。

sentences.sentence: It is recognised as being particularly conducive to enriching and enhancing the standing of tourism, on the basis that this form of tourism respects the natural heritage and local populations and are in keeping with the carrying capacity of the sites.
sentences.translation: 它被认为尤其有助于丰富和提升旅游业的地位，因为这种旅游形式尊重自然遗产和当地民众，并且符合场地的承载能力。

structure.text: is recognised as being particularly conducive to enriching and enhancing the standing of tourism
on the basis that this form of tourism respects the natural heritage and local populations and are in keeping with the carrying capacity of the sites
respects the natural heritage and local populations
and are in keeping with the carrying capacity of the sites

difficult_points: It 指代前一句定义中的这种负责任的旅行方式（生态旅游）。
is recognised as being conducive to 是被动语态，意为“被认为有助于……”。
on the basis that... 引导原因状语，说明前面这一看法的依据。
从句中 respects 与 are 并列作谓语，但主语 this form of tourism 为单数，are 却用复数形式，属原文主谓不一致的瑕疵。

sentences.sentence: Cuba is undoubtedly an obvious site for ecotourism, with its picturesque beaches, underwater beauty, countryside landscapes, and ecological reserves.
sentences.translation: 古巴无疑是发展生态旅游的理想之地，拥有风景如画的海滩、迷人的海底景观、乡村风光和生态保护区。

structure.text: with its picturesque beaches, underwater beauty, countryside landscapes, and ecological reserves

difficult_points: undoubtedly 是插入的副词，加强语气，意为“无疑”。
with 引导的介词短语补充说明古巴具备的资源条件，不是伴随状语从句。

sentences.sentence: An educated population and improved infrastructure of roads and communications adds to the mix.
sentences.translation: 受过良好教育的民众以及不断改善的道路与通信基础设施，进一步增添了这里的优势。

structure.text: An educated population and improved infrastructure of roads and communications

difficult_points: 主语是由 and 连接的两个并列名词短语，整体作单数看待，谓语用了 adds。
add to the mix 是习语，意为“为……锦上添花、增添有利因素”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 锦上添花；增添有利因素

sentences.sentence: In the Caribbean region, Cuba is now the second most popular tourist destination.
sentences.translation: 在加勒比地区，古巴目前是第二受欢迎的旅游目的地。

structure.text: the second most popular tourist destination

difficult_points: In the Caribbean region 是地点状语，置于句首。
the second most popular 表示“第二受欢迎的”，most popular 前加 second 表示排名。

sentences.sentence: Ecotourism is also seen as an environmental education opportunity to heighten both visitors' and residents' awareness of environmental and conservation issues, and even to inspire conservation action.
sentences.translation: 生态旅游也被视为一种环境教育机会，既能提高游客和居民对环境与保护问题的意识，甚至还能激发保护行动。

structure.text: to heighten both visitors' and residents' awareness of environmental and conservation issues
and even to inspire conservation action

difficult_points: is seen as 是被动结构，意为“被视为”。
both visitors' and residents' 修饰 awareness，说明提升意识的对象包括游客和居民双方。
两个不定式 to heighten 和 to inspire 并列，共同说明这一教育机会的作用。

sentences.sentence: Ecotourism has also been credited with promoting peace, by providing opportunities for educational and cultural exchange.
sentences.translation: 生态旅游还被认为有助于促进和平，因为它提供了教育和文化交流的机会。

structure.text: by providing opportunities for educational and cultural exchange

difficult_points: be credited with doing 表示“因……而受到肯定、被认为具有……功劳”。
by providing... 是方式状语，说明促进和平是通过怎样的途径实现的。

sentences.sentence: Tourists' safety and health are guaranteed.
sentences.translation: 游客的安全与健康有保障。
difficult_points: are guaranteed 是被动语态，强调安全和健康“被保障”这一状态。
safety and health 两个并列名词共同作主语，谓语用复数 are。

sentences.sentence: Raul Castro, brother of the Cuban president, started this initiative to rescue the Cuban tradition of herbal medicine and provide natural medicines for its healthcare system.
sentences.translation: 古巴总统的兄弟劳尔·卡斯特罗发起了这项倡议，旨在拯救古巴传统草药医学，并为该国医疗系统提供天然药物。

structure.text: to rescue the Cuban tradition of herbal medicine and provide natural medicines for its healthcare system

difficult_points: brother of the Cuban president 是插入的同位语，说明 Raul Castro 的身份。
不定式 to rescue... and provide... 并列，共同说明发起这项倡议的目的。

sentences.sentence: The school at Las Terrazas Eco-Tourism Community teaches herbal healthcare and children learn not only how to use medicinal herbs, but also to grow them in the school garden for teas, tinctures, ointments and creams.
sentences.translation: 拉斯特拉萨斯生态旅游社区的学校教授草药保健知识，孩子们不仅学习如何使用药用草药，还学习在校园花园里种植这些草药，用来制作茶饮、酊剂、软膏和乳霜。

structure.text: The school at Las Terrazas Eco-Tourism Community
and children learn not only how to use medicinal herbs, but also to grow them in the school garden for teas, tinctures, ointments and creams
not only how to use medicinal herbs
but also to grow them in the school garden for teas, tinctures, ointments and creams

difficult_points: and children learn 引出并列分句，主语由 the school 转为 children。
not only... but also... 连接 learn 的两个宾语：一个是“如何使用”的间接疑问句，一个是“种植”的不定式。
them 指代前面的 medicinal herbs。

sentences.sentence: In Cuba, ecotourism has the potential to alleviate poverty by bringing money into the economy and creating jobs.
sentences.translation: 在古巴，生态旅游有潜力通过为经济带来资金和创造就业机会来缓解贫困。

structure.text: by bringing money into the economy and creating jobs

difficult_points: have the potential to do 表示“有潜力做某事”。
by bringing... and creating... 是方式状语，两个动名词短语并列，说明缓解贫困的具体途径。

sentences.sentence: In addition to the environmental impacts of these efforts, the area works on developing community employment opportunities for locals, in conjunction with ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 除了这些努力带来的环境影响之外，该地区还结合生态旅游，致力于为当地居民开发社区就业机会。

structure.text: In addition to the environmental impacts of these efforts
developing community employment opportunities for locals

difficult_points: In addition to 引导附加状语，意为“除……之外”，与后文形成递进关系。
work on doing 表示“致力于做某事”。
in conjunction with 表示“结合……；与……相配合”。

sentences.sentence: In terms of South America, it might be the place which shows the shortcoming of ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 就南美洲而言，它可能是暴露出生态旅游弊端的地方。

structure.text: which shows the shortcoming of ecotourism

difficult_points: In terms of 引出话题状语，意为“就……而言”。
it 指代 South America。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 the place。

sentences.sentence: Histoplasma capsulatum, a dimorphic fungus, is the most common endemic mycosis in the United States, and is associated with exposure to bat or bird droppings.
sentences.translation: 荚膜组织胞浆菌是一种双相型真菌，是美国最常见的地方性真菌病，与接触蝙蝠或鸟类粪便有关。

structure.text: the most common endemic mycosis in the United States
and is associated with exposure to bat or bird droppings

difficult_points: a dimorphic fungus 是插入同位语，说明该病原体的类型。
is associated with 表示“与……有关”，说明感染与接触蝙蝠/鸟类粪便的关联。

sentences.sentence: Most recently, outbreaks have been reported in healthy travelers who returned from Central and South America after engaging in recreational activities associated with spelunking, adventure tourism, and ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 最近，有报告显示，一些健康的旅行者在中美洲和南美洲从事洞穴探险、探险旅游和生态旅游等休闲活动后返回时，出现了疫情爆发。

structure.text: who returned from Central and South America
after engaging in recreational activities associated with spelunking, adventure tourism, and ecotourism
associated with spelunking, adventure tourism, and ecotourism

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 healthy travelers。
after engaging in... 是时间状语，说明疫情出现在参与这些活动之后。
associated with... 是过去分词短语，修饰 recreational activities。

sentences.sentence: It is quite often to see tourists neglected sanitation while travelling.
sentences.translation: 游客在旅行时忽视卫生问题的情况相当常见。

structure.text: to see tourists neglected sanitation while travelling

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的内容是后面的不定式短语。
原文 to see tourists neglected sanitation 表达不规范，正常应为 to see tourists neglecting sanitation（感官动词 see + 宾语 + doing），此处按原文保留。
while travelling 省略了主语和 be 动词，完整形式为 while they are travelling。

sentences.sentence: After engaging in high-risk activities, boots should be hosed off and clothing placed in airtight plastic bags for laundering.
sentences.translation: 参与高风险活动之后，靴子应当用水冲洗干净，衣物应放入密封塑料袋中以便清洗。

structure.text: and clothing placed in airtight plastic bags for laundering

difficult_points: After engaging in... 是时间状语，动名词短语的隐含主语与主句一致（旅行者）。
clothing placed 承前省略了 should be，完整应为 clothing should be placed。
for laundering 表示放入密封袋的目的。

sentences.sentence: HIV-infected travelers should avoid risky behaviors or environments, such as exploring caves, particularly those that contain bat droppings.
sentences.translation: 感染艾滋病毒的旅行者应避免危险的行为或环境，例如探索洞穴，尤其是那些含有蝙蝠粪便的洞穴。

structure.text: such as exploring caves, particularly those that contain bat droppings

difficult_points: such as exploring caves 举例说明危险环境的具体类型。
particularly those 中的 those 指代 caves，其后 that 从句进一步限定是哪类洞穴。

sentences.sentence: Nowhere is the keen eye and intimate knowledge of ecotourism is more amidst this fantastic biodiversity, as we explore remote realms rich in wildlife rather than a nature adventure.
sentences.translation: 对生态旅游的敏锐眼光和深刻认识，在这片奇妙的生物多样性中体现得最为充分——我们探索的是野生动物丰富的偏远地带，而不是普通的自然探险。

structure.text: is the keen eye and intimate knowledge of ecotourism is more amidst this fantastic biodiversity
the keen eye and intimate knowledge of ecotourism
as we explore remote realms rich in wildlife rather than a nature adventure
explore remote realms rich in wildlife

difficult_points: 句中出现两个 is（is...is more），属原文语法错误，正常逻辑应只保留一个系动词。
Nowhere 位于句首本应触发倒装，但因原句语法混乱，倒装结构并不完整，按原文保留。
as 在这里引导从句，意为“当……之时”，rich in wildlife 是分词短语修饰 remote realms。
rather than a nature adventure 表示对比，暗示这是深度探索而非普通的“自然探险”。

sentences.sentence: A sustainable tour is significant for ecotourism, one in which we can grow hand in hand with nature and our community, respecting everything that makes us privileged.
sentences.translation: 可持续旅游对生态旅游至关重要，这是一种能让我们与自然和社区携手共同发展的旅游方式，同时尊重一切赋予我们特权的事物。

structure.text: one in which we can grow hand in hand with nature and our community
in which we can grow hand in hand with nature and our community
respecting everything that makes us privileged

difficult_points: one 指代 a sustainable tour，引出同位语进一步说明其特点。
in which 引导定语从句，修饰 one（tour），说明在这种旅游中人与自然、社区共同发展。
respecting... 是现在分词短语作伴随状语，逻辑主语是 we。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 everything。

sentences.sentence: Travelers get great joy from every step that take forward on this endless but exciting journey towards sustainability.
sentences.translation: 旅行者从这条通向可持续性、虽无止境却充满魅力的旅程中，从迈出的每一步中获得巨大的喜悦。

structure.text: that take forward on this endless but exciting journey towards sustainability

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 every step，从句谓语 take 缺少主语，原文表达不规范（正常应为 they take 或 taken），此处按原文保留。
endless but exciting 并列形容词修饰 journey，形成对比。
towards sustainability 表示这段旅程的方向或目标。

sentences.sentence: The primary threats to South America's tropical forests are deforestation caused by agricultural expansion, cattle ranching, fagging, oil extraction and spills, mining, illegal coca farming, and colonization initiatives.
sentences.translation: 南美洲热带森林面临的主要威胁，是由农业扩张、放牧养牛、伐木、石油开采与泄漏、采矿、非法古柯种植以及殖民计划所造成的森林砍伐。

structure.text: The primary threats to South America's tropical forests
caused by agricultural expansion, cattle ranching, fagging, oil extraction and spills, mining, illegal coca farming, and colonization initiatives

difficult_points: caused by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 deforestation，列举森林砍伐的具体成因。
fagging 应为 logging（伐木）的笔误，原文照录。
并列成分较长，包含七个由 caused by 引出的原因，需逐一对应理解。

sentences.sentence: Deforestation has shrunk territories belonging to indigenous peoples and wiped out more than 90% of the population.
sentences.translation: 森林砍伐已使原住民的领地大幅缩减，并消灭了超过90%的原住民人口。

structure.text: and wiped out more than 90% of the population

difficult_points: belonging to indigenous peoples 是现在分词短语，修饰 territories。
has shrunk 和 wiped out 共用主语 Deforestation，是并列的两个谓语动作。
the population 指代前面提到的 indigenous peoples 这一群体。

sentences.sentence: Many are taking leading roles in sustainable tourism even as they introduce protected regions to more travelers.
sentences.translation: 许多人在推动可持续旅游方面发挥着引领作用，同时也在向更多旅行者介绍受保护的地区。

structure.text: even as they introduce protected regions to more travelers

difficult_points: Many 是代词，泛指“许多人”，指代前文提到的当地居民/从业者。
even as 引导让步兼时间状语，意为“与此同时；尽管如此”。

sentences.sentence: In East Africa, significantly reducing such illegal hunting and allowing wildlife populations to recover would allow the generation of significant economic benefits through trophy hunting and potentially ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 在东非，大幅减少此类非法狩猎行为并使野生动物种群得以恢复，将有望通过战利品狩猎乃至生态旅游产生可观的经济效益。

structure.text: significantly reducing such illegal hunting and allowing wildlife populations to recover
the generation of significant economic benefits
through trophy hunting and potentially ecotourism

difficult_points: 句子主语是两个并列的动名词短语（reducing... and allowing...），而非 East Africa。
allow wildlife populations to recover 中 to recover 是宾语补足语，说明 allowing 的结果。
through trophy hunting and potentially ecotourism 说明产生经济效益的具体途径。

expressions.meaning_zh: 战利品狩猎（有偿猎捕野生动物）

sentences.sentence: "Illegal hunting is an extremely inefficient use of wildlife resources because it fails to capture the value of wildlife achievable through alternative forms of use such as trophy hunting and ecotourism," said Peter Lindsey, author of the new study.
sentences.translation: “非法狩猎是对野生动物资源极其低效的利用方式，因为它未能获取通过战利品狩猎和生态旅游等替代性利用方式本可实现的野生动物价值，”这项新研究的作者彼得·林赛说道。

structure.text: Illegal hunting is an extremely inefficient use of wildlife resources
because it fails to capture the value of wildlife achievable through alternative forms of use such as trophy hunting and ecotourism
to capture the value of wildlife
achievable through alternative forms of use such as trophy hunting and ecotourism
said Peter Lindsey, author of the new study

difficult_points: 引语部分是直接引语，said 位于主语 Peter Lindsey 之前，属于引语后的倒装。
it 指代前面的 Illegal hunting。
achievable 是形容词，修饰 value，说明这种价值本可通过其他方式实现却未被利用。
author of the new study 是同位语，补充说明 Peter Lindsey 的身份。

sentences.sentence: Most residents believed that ecotourism could solve this circumstance.
sentences.translation: 大多数居民认为，生态旅游能够解决这一状况。

structure.text: that ecotourism could solve this circumstance

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 believed 的宾语。
this circumstance 指代前文提到的非法狩猎问题。

sentences.sentence: They have passion for local community empowerment, loves photography and writes to laud current local conservation efforts, create environmental awareness and promote ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 他们热衷于赋能当地社区，热爱摄影，并撰写文章来赞扬当前当地的保护工作、提升环保意识并推广生态旅游。

structure.text: have passion for local community empowerment
and writes to laud current local conservation efforts, create environmental awareness and promote ecotourism
to laud current local conservation efforts, create environmental awareness and promote ecotourism

difficult_points: 主语 They 为复数，但谓语 loves、writes 却用了单数形式，属原文主谓一致错误。
have、loves、writes 是三个并列谓语，共享主语 They。
laud、create、promote 是共享 to 的三个并列不定式，说明撰写文章的三个目的。

sentences.sentence: In Indonesia, ecotourism started to become an important concept from 1995, in order to strengthen the domestic travelling movement, the local government targeting the right markets is a prerequisite for successful ecotourism.
sentences.translation: 在印度尼西亚，生态旅游自1995年起开始成为一个重要概念；为了加强国内旅游运动，当地政府瞄准正确的市场，是生态旅游取得成功的先决条件。

structure.text: in order to strengthen the domestic travelling movement
the local government targeting the right markets

difficult_points: 句子实际包含两个独立分句，中间仅用逗号连接（逗号拼接），属原文标点瑕疵。
in order to strengthen... 是目的状语，修饰第二个分句。
targeting the right markets 是现在分词短语，修饰 the local government，真正的主语中心是 the local government（而非 targeting）。

sentences.sentence: The market segment for Indonesian ecotourism consists of: (i) "The silent generation", 55-64 year-old people who are wealthy enough, generally well-educated and have no dependent children, and can travel for four weeks; (ii)"The baby boom generation", junior successful executives aged 35-54 years, who are likely to be travelling with their family and children (spending 2-3 weeks on travel) – travelling for them is a stress reliever; and (iii) the "X generation", aged 18-29 years, who love to do ecotours as backpackers – they are generally students who can travel for 3-12 months with monthly expenditure of US$300-500.
sentences.translation: 印度尼西亚生态旅游的市场细分包括：（i）“沉默的一代”，即55至64岁、经济较为宽裕、通常受过良好教育且没有需要抚养的子女、可以旅行四周的人群；（ii）“婴儿潮一代”，即35至54岁、事业初有所成的高管，他们很可能携家人和孩子一起旅行（花费2至3周时间）——对他们而言，旅行是一种减压方式；以及（iii）“X世代”，即18至29岁、喜欢以背包客身份进行生态旅行的人群——他们通常是能以每月300至500美元的花销旅行3至12个月的学生。

structure.text: The market segment for Indonesian ecotourism
who are wealthy enough, generally well-educated and have no dependent children, and can travel for four weeks
(ii)"The baby boom generation", junior successful executives aged 35-54 years
who are likely to be travelling with their family and children
travelling for them is a stress reliever
who love to do ecotours as backpackers
who can travel for 3-12 months with monthly expenditure of US$300-500

difficult_points: 冒号后由 (i)(ii)(iii) 引出三类目标市场人群的平行列举结构。
破折号插入语分别补充说明对应人群旅行的意义或身份（减压方式 / 学生身份）。
多个 who 引导的定语从句层层修饰各类人群，需要对应到各自的先行词。

sentences.sentence: It is suggested that promotion of Indonesian ecotourism products should aim to reach these various cohorts of tourists.
sentences.translation: 有建议指出，印度尼西亚生态旅游产品的推广应力求覆盖这些不同类型的游客群体。

structure.text: that promotion of Indonesian ecotourism products should aim to reach these various cohorts of tourists

difficult_points: It is suggested that... 是 it 作形式主语的被动结构，意为“有人建议……”。
aim to do 表示“力求做到、旨在”。

sentences.sentence: The country welcomes diverse levels of travelers.
sentences.translation: 该国欢迎各种层次的旅行者。
difficult_points: The country 指代前文的 Indonesia。
diverse levels of travelers 泛指不同消费水平/身份层次的游客。

sentences.sentence: On the other hand, ecotourism provide as many services as traditional tourism.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，生态旅游提供的服务与传统旅游一样丰富。

structure.text: as many services as traditional tourism

difficult_points: On the other hand 表转折/对比，承接上文关于生态旅游局限性的讨论。
provide 应为 provides，主谓不一致，属原文瑕疵。
as many services as 是同级比较结构，将生态旅游与传统旅游的服务数量作比较。

sentences.sentence: Nestled between Mexico, Guatemala and the Caribbean Sea is the country of Belize.
sentences.translation: 坐落于墨西哥、危地马拉和加勒比海之间的，便是伯利兹这个国家。

structure.text: Nestled between Mexico, Guatemala and the Caribbean Sea

difficult_points: 句子为倒装结构，过去分词短语 Nestled... 位于句首，真正的主语 the country of Belize 后置。
Nestled between 表示“坐落于……之间”。

sentences.sentence: It is the wonderful place for Hamanasi honeymoon, bottle of champagne upon arrival, three meals daily, a private service on one night of your stay and a choice of adventures depending on the length of your stay.
sentences.translation: 这里是享受哈马纳西蜜月的绝佳去处：抵达时奉上一瓶香槟，每日三餐，逗留期间有一晚享受私人服务，还可根据逗留时长挑选各种冒险活动。

structure.text: the wonderful place for Hamanasi honeymoon
bottle of champagne upon arrival, three meals daily, a private service on one night of your stay and a choice of adventures depending on the length of your stay
depending on the length of your stay

difficult_points: It 指代前一句提到的 Belize。
并列成分（champagne, meals, private service, choice of adventures）具体列举蜜月套餐包含的内容，与 place 同位说明。
depending on 是现在分词短语作状语，修饰 a choice of adventures，表示“根据……而定”。

sentences.sentence: It also offers six-night and seven-night honeymoon packages.
sentences.translation: 这里还提供六晚和七晚的蜜月套餐。
difficult_points: It 继续指代 Belize（该蜜月度假地）。
six-night 和 seven-night 是复合形容词，用连字符连接数词和名词单数形式修饰 packages。

sentences.sentence: A variety of specially tailored tours, including the Brimstone Hill Fortress, and a trip to a neighboring island.
sentences.translation: 多种专门定制的旅游项目，包括布林斯通山堡垒之旅，以及前往邻近岛屿的行程。

structure.text: A variety of specially tailored tours
and a trip to a neighboring island

difficult_points: 本句缺少主要谓语动词，是一个由名词短语构成的片段句，属原文表达不完整。
including... 是现在分词短语，列举 tailored tours 的一个具体例子。

sentences.sentence: Guided tours include rainforest, volcano and off-road plantation tours.
sentences.translation: 向导式旅游包括热带雨林、火山和越野种植园游览项目。

structure.text: rainforest, volcano and off-road plantation tours

difficult_points: Guided tours 中 Guided 是过去分词作前置定语，修饰 tours，意为“有导游带领的旅游”。
rainforest、volcano 和 off-road plantation 均修饰其后的 tours，构成三个并列的旅游类型。

expressions.meaning_zh: 向导式旅游；有导游带领的游览

sentences.sentence: Gregory Pereira, an extremely knowledgeable and outgoing hiking and tour guide, says the following about his tours: "All of our tours on St. Kitts include transportation by specially modified Land Rovers, a picnic of island pastries and local fruit, fresh tropical juices, CSR, a qualified island guide and a full liability insurance coverage for participants.
sentences.translation: 格雷戈里·佩雷拉是一位学识渊博、性格外向的徒步旅行兼导游，他这样介绍自己带的团：“我们在圣基茨的所有团组行程都包括乘坐特别改装的路虎揽胜、享用岛屿糕点和当地水果的野餐、新鲜热带果汁、企业社会责任活动、一位合格的岛屿向导，以及为参与者提供的全额责任险保障。

structure.text: an extremely knowledgeable and outgoing hiking and tour guide

"All of our tours on St. Kitts include transportation by specially modified Land Rovers, a picnic of island pastries and local fruit, fresh tropical juices, CSR, a qualified island guide and a full liability insurance coverage for participants.
All of our tours on St. Kitts

transportation by specially modified Land Rovers, a picnic of island pastries and local fruit, fresh tropical juices, CSR, a qualified island guide and a full liability insurance coverage for participants

difficult_points: an extremely knowledgeable and outgoing hiking and tour guide 是插入的同位语，说明 Gregory Pereira 的身份。
says the following 后接冒号引出直接引语，引语内容一直延续到句末且原文缺少结尾引号，属原文标点瑕疵。
include 后并列多个名词短语，逐一列举旅行团提供的服务内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 学识渊博且性格外向的

sentences.sentence: Kodai is an ultimate splendor spot for those who love being close to mother nature.
sentences.translation: 高地（Kodai）是那些热爱亲近大自然之人的终极胜地。

structure.text: for those who love being close to mother nature
who love being close to mother nature

difficult_points: for those who... 中 those 泛指“……的人”，who 引导定语从句修饰 those。
being close to 是动名词短语，作 love 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: They say every bird must sing its own throat while we say every traveller should find his own way out of variegated and unblemished paths of deep valleys and steep mountains.
sentences.translation: 人们常说，每只鸟都得用自己的喉咙歌唱；而我们要说，每位旅行者都应当在幽深峡谷与陡峭山峦之间那些多姿多彩、未受破坏的小径中，找到属于自己的路。

structure.text: every bird must sing its own throat
while we say every traveller should find his own way out of variegated and unblemished paths of deep valleys and steep mountains
every traveller should find his own way out of variegated and unblemished paths of deep valleys and steep mountains

difficult_points: They 泛指人们，与后文 we 形成对比。
while 在此表对比，意为“而”。
sing its own throat 表达不规范，正常搭配应为 sing with its own throat，此处按原文保留。
out of variegated and unblemished paths... 修饰 find his own way，说明旅行者在多种小径中寻找自己的路。

expressions.meaning_zh: 多姿多彩且未受破坏的

sentences.sentence: The cheese factory here exports great quantity of cheese to various countries across the globe.
sentences.translation: 这里的奶酪工厂向全球多个国家出口大量奶酪。

structure.text: to various countries across the globe

difficult_points: here 作后置修饰语，限定 the cheese factory 的位置。
across the globe 修饰 various countries，意为“全球各地的”。

sentences.sentence: It is located in the center of forest.
sentences.translation: 它坐落在森林的中心。
difficult_points: It 指代前文的 cheese factory。
be located in 表示“位于……”。

sentences.sentence: Many travelers are attracted by the delicious cheese.
sentences.translation: 许多旅行者都被这美味的奶酪所吸引。
difficult_points: are attracted by 是被动语态，表示“被……吸引”。
delicious 直接修饰 cheese，说明吸引游客的原因。

sentences.sentence: The ecotourism is very famous of this different eating experience.
sentences.translation: 这里的生态旅游正是因为这种独特的饮食体验而闻名。
difficult_points: famous of 搭配有误，正常应为 famous for，此处按原文保留。
this different eating experience 指代前文提到的奶酪工厂带来的独特饮食体验。

expressions.meaning_zh: 以……闻名（原文误用 famous of）
